response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong fullstack development experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, along with expertise in scalable architectures and modern tooling. His background in renewable energy-adjacent projects (e.g., GISCollective) aligns well with the role's industry focus. However, his recent roles emphasize senior-level responsibilities rather than entry/mid-level, and his focus on AI-agent infrastructure may overshadow traditional fullstack work.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React proficiency with real-world project experience
Strong background in scalable architectures (Kubernetes, AWS, Docker) and clean code practices
Relevant industry exposure (renewable energy via GISCollective) and pragmatic problem-solving
concerns: Current role (Staff Engineer) suggests overqualification for an entry/mid-level position
Limited recent PostgreSQL/relational database focus compared to MongoDB and Dlang
Minimal direct experience with energy consulting or renovation workflows
